channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 34.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Rocking back and forth, reminding myself that Andy Burnham actually does have a cultural hinterland and therefore we might get a good culture secretary soon, ignoring the signs that Lisa Nandy may get another Cabinet ...
item.description: Rocking back and forth, reminding myself that Andy Burnham actually does have a cultural hinterland and therefore we might get a good culture secretary soon, ignoring the signs that Lisa Nandy may get another Cabinet ...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour likely to win next election with Burnham as leader, say party members – UK politics live
item.description: Labour likely to win next election with Burnham as leader, say party members – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This week's column: challenge for Labour and for Keir Starmer's replacement is twofold: both need to run the country *and* do the intellectual heavy lifting that Starmer-Labour did not do in opposition:
item.description: This week's column: challenge for Labour and for Keir Starmer's replacement is twofold: both need to run the country *and* do the intellectual heavy lifting that Starmer-Labour did not do in opposition:

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: How should Britain tame the bond markets? New piece by me for Arguably.
- Get serious on spending reform (e.g. triple lock) and pro-growth supply-side reform.
- Bank of England should pause its bond sell-offs.
- Bu...
item.description:
How should Britain tame the bond markets? New piece by me for Arguably.
- Get serious on spending reform (e.g. triple lock) and pro-growth supply-side reform.
- Bank of England should pause its bond sell-offs.
- Bu...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham would beat Keir Starmer in leadership contest, new poll reveals
item.description: Andy Burnham would beat Keir Starmer in leadership contest, new poll reveals

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: There is also a world of difference between “I think people are wrong to hate Starmer for those reasons” and “it is a mystery why people hate Starmer”. If you think people are being unfair to him, make the case! But d...
item.description: There is also a world of difference between “I think people are wrong to hate Starmer for those reasons” and “it is a mystery why people hate Starmer”. If you think people are being unfair to him, make the case! But d...

item.title: FT UK Politics: The Labour Party’s attitude to Brexit is like the country’s view of church
item.description: The Labour Party’s attitude to Brexit is like the country’s view of church

item.title: The Times: Andy Burnham backtracks on Brexit as he makes leadership pitch - The Times
item.description: Andy Burnham backtracks on Brexit as he makes leadership pitch - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK won’t have ‘tailor-made’ deal to rejoin EU, former officials warn as Labour reopens Brexit debate
item.description: UK won’t have ‘tailor-made’ deal to rejoin EU, former officials warn as Labour reopens Brexit debate

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: No, most people are pretty clear if you take the time to listen to them: winter fuel, the cost of living, public services not improving, *that* LBC interview.
Unsurprisingly both the “oh ho, who can say why the dumm...
item.description:
No, most people are pretty clear if you take the time to listen to them: winter fuel, the cost of living, public services not improving, *that* LBC interview.
Unsurprisingly both the “oh ho, who can say why the dumm...
